steps.title: Substitute the y-coordinate of the intersection point
steps.content:
The intersection point is $(q, 17)$ with $y = 17$. Substitute into both equations:

Equation 1: $-x - 17w = -340$
Equation 2: $2x - 17w = 17$

steps.title: Eliminate x and solve for w
steps.content:
Multiply equation 1 by 2:
$$-2x - 34w = -680$$
Add to equation 2 to eliminate $x$:
$$-2x - 34w + 2x - 17w = -680 + 17$$
$$-51w = -663$$
$$w = 13$$
